description: catwalk's sandals styled with a chic wooden heel and platform, making it perfect for vacations in the tropic. There aren't enough occasions that an Indian diva can wear this to! Wear this with dressy off-duty ensembles for a subtle and roguish touch of the Texas cowgirl. heels: 4"UpperSynthetic leather upper riveted to the wooden outsoleStraps for the forefoot and midfootA loop around the ankle with a classic buckle closurePadded patch on the footbed for comfort to the heelOutsoleTPR outsole referenced from wood with plastic terrace grooved patches on the heel and forefootshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
